sentences.arabic: طَلَبَتْ مُنَى مِنْ أَبِيهَا أَنْ يَشْتَرِيَ لَهَا قَلَمًا.
sentences.translation: Muna je zamolila oca da joj kupi olovku.
sentences.translationEn: Muna asked her father to buy her a pen.

sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَا مَعًا إِلَى مَحَلِّ الأَدَوَاتِ المَكْتَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Otišli su zajedno u prodavnicu školskog pribora.
sentences.translationEn: They went together to the stationery shop.

sentences.arabic: اخْتَارَتْ مُنَى قَلَمًا أَحْمَرَ بِسِعْرٍ بَسِيطٍ.
sentences.translation: Muna je odabrala crvenu olovku po jednostavnoj cijeni.
sentences.translationEn: Muna chose a red pen at a simple price.

sentences.translation: Otac je platio cijenu i zahvalio prodavaču.
sentences.translationEn: The father paid the price and thanked the seller.

sentences.translation: Muna je bila sretna sa svojom novom olovkom.
sentences.translationEn: Muna was happy with her new pen.
